input.headline: Why trying too hard may be holding you back at work

raw.headline: Why trying too hard may be holding you back at work

winner: I finally decided to stop trying so hard at work—my boss was impressed for about two seconds before realizing I’d just stopped doing my job altogether and started napping in the break room.

candidates.text: I tried so hard to impress my boss that I accidentally formatted his computer — now he's thinking I'm a genius.
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 8.5, "reason": "Surprising twist with a specific, relatable scenario; concise and funny."}

candidates.text: My boss told me I was trying too hard to be a team player, so I stopped moving entirely and now I'm just a very dedicated piece of office furniture.
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 8.5, "reason": "Surprising twist with a specific workplace scenario, concise and naturally funny"}

candidates.text: I tried so hard to impress my boss that I accidentally built a pyramid out of sticky notes and got fired for "excessive organizational commitment.
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 8.5, "reason": "Surprising and specific scenario with a clever twist on 'organizational commitment'"}

candidates.text: I applied for a job where I wrote my cover letter with so much enthusiasm that I accidentally stapled myself to the application form. The interviewer said, "Wow, you're really committed," and I replied, "Well, apparently, I'm a little too invested in paperwork.
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 8.5, "reason": "Surprising and specific scenario with a clever twist, concise and naturally funny."}

candidates.text: I tried to impress my boss by working 100 hours a week, but apparently, I was just overcompensating for my lack of talent.
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 8.5, "reason": "Surprising twist on overworking, specific to workplace context, concise and naturally funny."}

candidates.text: I finally decided to stop trying so hard at work—my boss was impressed for about two seconds before realizing I’d just stopped doing my job altogether and started napping in the break room.
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 8.5, "reason": "Surprising twist with specific workplace scenario, concise and naturally funny"}

candidates.text: My boss told me to stop trying so hard because it was making me a burden, but I told him I’m just trying to be a heavy lifter.
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 8.0, "reason": "The joke is concise, uses a play on words ('heavy lifter' as both a literal and metaphorical term), and delivers a surprising twist that aligns with the headline's theme."}

candidates.text: I decided to stop trying so hard at my job that my boss finally stopped asking me why I was doing such a great job.
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 6.5, "reason": "The joke has a clever twist but lacks punch and feels slightly forced in its setup. The surprise element is present, but the humor could be more concise and natural."}

candidates.text: I'm a human lie detector—my success rate is 92%. I can tell when someone's lying... and when they're overdoing their honesty.
